title: capsella denticulata
intro: Capsella denticulata, also known as sharp-fringed shepherd's purse, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as coughs, colds, and digestive issues. The seeds and leaves of the plant are used to prepare herbal remedies that have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Capsella denticulata is often prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in poultices and salves to treat skin conditions and wounds.
